critical_findings.title: Branch 3 unreachable — proposal locus is dead code
critical_findings.description: Both runners gate classify() on exit_code == 0. Non-zero exits emit a synthesized [EXIT:n] user message at runner level and bypass classify() entirely. The proposal's headline change cannot deliver the headline result without an additional runner-gate flip.
critical_findings.recommendation: Move INFORMATIONAL_NONZERO check to the runner level where pane_info/app_type is in scope; keep classify() app-agnostic.

critical_findings.title: Merge-gate metric not computable; cost_tokens hard-coded to 0
critical_findings.description: cost_tokens=0 is hard-coded in run_scenario_baseline and run_scenario_phase1. The 6 existing scenarios target L2 ByteClassifier, not ScreenClassifier. aggregate() produces median_cost over scenarios that don't invoke classify(). The proposal's gate aggregates zeros.
critical_findings.recommendation: Decouple eval harness from production change; use deterministic (cmd, exit_code) -> (event, needs_llm) unit-test fixture (~30 cases) + production-telemetry baseline.

verdict_rationale: The reason-loop's converged direction (reduce shell-mode escalation cost by adding command-awareness) survives swarm scrutiny. The specific implementation shape in round3/candidate_A.md has two CRITICAL gaps (dead-code locus, unmeasurable gate) plus 9 HIGH-severity refinements. Combined diff is well past the proposal's '5 files, ~25 LOC, no new module' estimate. The reason-loop's runner-up (round 3 AB with the decision-log + replay-tool seam) becomes a viable round-4 starting point given the swarm-identified scope expansion.
next_step_recommendation: Re-run reason loop with the swarm's CRITICAL + HIGH findings injected into the brief, OR proceed to /autoresearch:debug with the hypothesis queue to empirically verify H-01 and H-02 before any code work.
